title: Bind Mounts should be mounted read-only when in read-only mode
body:
We don't want to allow users to write to /etc/resolv.conf or /etc/hosts if in read
only mode.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I think image volumes are added separately - might need to hit those too?
